sovrn.label: Sovrn Commerce / Skimlinks
sovrn.note: Default layer — auto-affiliates outbound links across thousands of merchants. Approval is fast and does not require existing sales.

amazon.label: Amazon Associates
amazon.note: High value but gated by the 3-sale rule (3 qualifying sales / 180 days). PA-API access only after those sales. Until then the Amazon adapter no-ops gracefully.

shareasale.label: ShareASale
shareasale.note: Direct network. Often 2-4x Sovrn's rate for merchants you feature heavily.

impact.label: Impact.com
impact.note: Premium network; many DTC brands run their programs here.
